evals.name: simple-feature-branch
evals.prompt: Start a branch for adding an outro animation to the blank video template at src/templates/00-blank/.
evals.expected_output: A branch name in `<type>/<kebab-description>` format. Type should be `feat`. Description should be kebab-case English, 2-5 words, and should reflect the scope (likely include `00-blank` and `outro`). Example: `feat/00-blank-outro-animation`.

evals.name: wrong-type-correction
evals.prompt: Make a branch called `feature/new-intro` for me to start working on the intro scene.
evals.expected_output: Skill should detect that `feature/` is not the canonical Conventional Commits prefix and correct it to `feat/`. Should produce something like `feat/new-intro` or a more descriptive variant like `feat/00-blank-new-intro`. Should NOT silently use `feature/...` as the user asked.

evals.name: improve-type-branch
evals.prompt: Start a branch for nudging the title spacing on the 00-blank template so it looks more balanced ŌĆö purely visual polish, not a new feature.
evals.expected_output: Branch in `<type>/<kebab-description>` format with type `improve` (user-visible polish, neither a feature nor a fix). e.g. `improve/00-blank-title-spacing`. Should lead with the `00-blank` scope. Must NOT use `feat`, `style`, or `refactor`.

evals.name: reject-bug-bugfix-hotfix-prefix
evals.prompt: Make a branch `bugfix/login-error` for fixing the broken login.
evals.expected_output: Should correct the non-canonical `bugfix/` prefix (the skill also rejects `bug/` and `hotfix/`) to `fix/` ŌĆö e.g. `fix/login-error`. Must NOT pass through `bugfix/...`. (`hotfix` maps to `fix`, or `chore` if it is a tooling tweak.)

evals.name: case-style-correction
evals.expected_output: Should convert camelCase (and snake_case) to kebab-case and add a type prefix: `feat/add-intro-animation`. Must NOT emit `addIntroAnimation` or `feat/addIntroAnimation`.

evals.name: chinese-trigger-non-english-description
evals.expected_output: Should trigger despite Chinese phrasing and no explicit 'branch name' request, and produce an English kebab-case branch with a correct type ŌĆö e.g. `feat/home-dark-mode`. Description must be English (never ķØ×Ķŗ▒µ¢ć), kebab-case, 2-5 words.
